blocks.content: The call lasted an hour. Mostly Eli telling the story of the street corner and the please and Priya laughing through crying, and Kit listening with the kind of full attention he only gave to things that mattered.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: It came out. I didn't plan it.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: It's the best part of the story.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: She thinks so too. She told her mom tonight and led with the please. I am now known as the man who said please.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Worse things to be known as.

blocks.speaker: Eli
blocks.content: We're going to be in each other's weddings.

blocks.speaker: Kit
blocks.content: Was there ever a version where we weren't.
Kit smiled at the ceiling of his dorm room in LA while his best friend did the same thing in Millhaven.
